title: 10 High-Yield Dividend Aristocrats Perfect For What's Coming Next

title: Church & Dwight to Webcast Discussion of Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Results on November 3
text: EWING, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) will webcast a discussion of its third quarter earnings results on Friday, November 3, 2023, beginning at 10:00 a.m. ET. Media and investors may access the live audio webcast at https://investor.churchdwight.com/ beginning at 10:00 a.m. ET. The webcast will also be available for replay.
